name: Avatar Pandora RPG
description:
Pandora RPG is an RPG Where you can play as a Na'Vi — an Avatar, or maybe even Sky people, you can do any scenarios such as Starting Wars, Taming Banshees, Or even create your Own Na'Vi Clan! Anything is possible, The Storyline can Go anywhere and anyhow.

Have fun Playing as a Na'Vi/Human.

I recommend using a proxy when using my bots, gemini, deepseek, claude, etc :)

PANDORA RPG 💫🌌
